mapper.select: SELECT c.company_id, c.company_code, c.active AS company_active, m.member_id, m.login_id, m.password_hash, m.name, m.role, m.password_status, m.temp_password_expires_at, m.active, m.login_failed_count, m.locked_until_at FROM tb_company c JOIN tb_member m ON m.company_id = c.company_id WHERE c.company_code = #{companyCode} AND m.login_id = #{loginId} LIMIT 1

SELECT c.company_id, c.company_code, c.active AS company_active, m.member_id, m.login_id, m.password_hash, m.name, m.role, m.password_status, m.temp_password_expires_at, m.active, m.login_failed_count, m.locked_until_at FROM tb_company c JOIN tb_member m ON m.company_id = c.company_id WHERE c.company_id = #{companyId} AND m.member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_auth_login_history ( company_id, member_id, company_code_snapshot, login_id_snapshot, login_result, failure_reason, login_ip, user_agent ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{memberId}, #{companyCodeSnapshot}, #{loginIdSnapshot}, #{loginResult}, #{failureReason}, #{loginIp}, #{userAgent} )

INSERT INTO tb_auth_refresh_token ( company_id, member_id, refresh_token_hash, token_family_id, expires_at, created_ip, created_user_agent ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{memberId}, #{refreshTokenHash}, #{tokenFamilyId}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdIp}, #{createdUserAgent} )
mapper.select: SELECT t.token_id, t.company_id, c.company_code, c.active AS company_active, t.member_id, m.login_id, m.name, m.role, m.password_status, m.active AS member_active, t.token_family_id, t.expires_at, t.revoked_at, t.revoked_reason FROM tb_auth_refresh_token t JOIN tb_company c ON c.company_id = t.company_id JOIN tb_member m ON m.company_id = t.company_id AND m.member_id = t.member_id WHERE t.refresh_token_hash = #{refreshTokenHash} LIMIT 1

SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_auth_refresh_token t JOIN tb_company c ON c.company_id = t.company_id JOIN tb_member m ON m.company_id = t.company_id AND m.member_id = t.member_id WHERE t.company_id = #{companyId} AND t.member_id = #{memberId} AND t.token_family_id = #{tokenFamilyId} AND t.revoked_at IS NULL AND t.expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) AND c.active = TRUE AND m.active = TRUE LIMIT 1 )
